user_request: Generate a bounded non-canonical block-color scene and evaluate ACT with the proposal-derived experimental SuccessSpec.

task_retrieval.reasoning: The canonical task defines authoritative behavior; the RGB task provides a useful color/appearance implementation pattern.

selected_examples.reason: TaskRetriever selected a method-level construction example

vision.diagnosis: 场景与需求一致，方块的颜色、大小和位置均符合预期，没有明显异常。

vision_validation.diagnosis: 场景与需求一致，方块的颜色、大小和位置均符合预期，没有明显异常。

backend_seed_alignment.reason: paired expert/ACT execution was not requested

catalog.name: hammer_pickup_height
catalog.description: Maximum hammer center height rise from the initial state.

catalog.name: first_hammer_pickup_step
catalog.description: First physics step where hammer height rise reaches the task pickup threshold.

catalog.name: hammer_block_min_xy_error
catalog.description: Minimum official functional-point XY alignment error.

catalog.name: hammer_block_contact_ever
catalog.description: Whether hammer and block ever had physical contact.

catalog.name: hammer_left_camera_contact_count
catalog.description: Count physical hammer-left_camera contact intervals as one bounded unintended-contact proxy.

catalog.name: first_contact_step
catalog.description: First hammer-block contact physics step and time.

catalog.name: max_contact_impulse
catalog.description: Maximum contact-point impulse during hammer-block contact.

catalog.name: ee_path_length
catalog.description: Active-arm TCP path length at physics resolution.

catalog.name: generated_check_success
catalog.description: Latched outcome from a validated compiled SuccessSpec.

catalog.name: time_to_success
catalog.description: Physics simulation time of the first official success.
